evidence.excerpt: I said, that's not right. What I, what I objected to so much in my attackers was that they hadn't done the research. If you can't research the case thoroughly, you're not entitled to make opinions. Mm-hmm. However, you know, in your case, I, I sort of broke that rule. You know, people who expect, uh, expressed negative things, uh, I can't, uh, break my rule of, uh, supporting other cases I did say. But the description of the craft that Bob Lazar saw is the closest to what we saw than any other case I've ever heard of. And, uh, and, uh, and then there were other silly arguments I had to shoot down because they were just so silly. Well, Bob can't be telling the truth because I checked the phone book at, uh, Area 51 and he's not in the phone book.
